mnemonics: Many Individuals Think Estimation Requires Assistance
Mother Insists Tricks Ensure Results Always
keyPoints: ARIMA stands for AutoRegressive Integrated Moving Average.
The three explicit forms are: ARIMA(p, d, q), ARIMA(p, d, q) with Seasonal, and ARIMA(p, d, q) with Exponential Smoothing.
p represents the number of autoregressive terms, d represents the degree of differencing, and q represents the number of moving average terms.
